title: SILK-129 All About Men And Women. Case 2 - Yukine Sakuragi
description: At the home party of the director's house, everyone who has a moment of drinking with a well-known member. It's ostensibly calm, but under the surface, the bargaining between men and women was mixed. Then, even though it was someone else's house, it was disturbed while being attracted to each other ...! A fixed-point observation of the bare appearance of ordinary working people everywhere seeking in a closed room with their desires.
